inputs.label: Number of Tasks
inputs.businessContext: Total number of tasks. Increasing tasks may extend project duration.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of tasks. Increasing tasks may extend project duration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam görev sayısı. Artan görevler proje süresini uzatabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Aufgaben. Mehr Aufgaben können die Projektdauer verlängern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de tâches. L'augmentation des tâches peut allonger la durée du projet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de tareas. Aumentar las tareas puede alargar la duración del proyecto.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد المهام. زيادة المهام قد تطيل مدة المشروع.

inputs.label: Duration per Task
inputs.businessContext: Time required to complete each task (days).

businessContext_i18n.en: Time required to complete each task (days).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir görevin tamamlanması için gereken süre (gün).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit, die für die Fertigstellung jeder Aufgabe benötigt wird (in Tagen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps nécessaire pour terminer chaque tâche (en jours).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo requerido para completar cada tarea (días).

inputs.label: Overlap Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Overlap percentage between consecutive tasks (fast-tracking). Between 0-100%.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Ardışık görevler arasındaki örtüşme yüzdesi (fast-tracking). %0-100 arası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Überlappung zwischen aufeinanderfolgenden Aufgaben (Fast-Tracking). 0-100%.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de chevauchement entre les tâches consécutives (fast-tracking). Entre 0 et 100 %.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de superposición entre tareas consecutivas (fast-tracking). Entre 0% y 100%.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة التداخل بين المهام المتتالية (التسريع). بين 0-100%.

inputs.label: Start Delay
inputs.businessContext: Delay time before starting the first task.

businessContext_i18n.en: Delay time before starting the first task.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk göreve başlamadan önceki gecikme süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verzögerung vor Beginn der ersten Aufgabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de retard avant la première tâche.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de retraso antes de comenzar la primera tarea.
businessContext_i18n.ar: وقت التأخير قبل بدء المهمة الأولى.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
